productName: ThunderStix BLUNT-Tilted-DOH-glass tip preroll(1.2g) / Gorilla Glue (IH)
description: This infused hybrid blunt pairs Gorilla Glue with a concentrate boost for a thicker, longer-lasting session and a noticeably stronger hit. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — an earthy, pungent, piney aroma with a heavy, relaxing feel, with a versatile, anytime balance. A little goes a long way.
